items.name: Cute Easter Bunny Ears
items.description:
🎁 Get this limited UGC in the game: 
https://www.roblox.com/games/108903312165288/Sleep-For-UGC

Complete your festive look with the Cute Easter Bunny Ears! These adorable bunny ears add a playful and charming touch to any avatar, perfect for celebrating spring and Easter vibes. Whether you're going for a soft cute style, a fun seasonal outfit, or just want to stand out with something unique, these ears bring personality, sweetness, and a touch of holiday magic to your avatar.
